title: Buffer Stock Blending System
description: NIIMBL and BioPhorum designed, built, and tested a full-scale, current good manufacturing practices (cGMP) system that delivers buffer on demand.
text:
In collaboration with BioPhorum, NIIMBL has designed, built, and tested a full-scale, current good manufacturing practices (cGMP) system that is able to deliver buffer on-demand.
We offer a variety of membership options that give you the flexibility to choose your organization’s level of engagement based on technology interests and priorities.
